Find Bias Features

Christine Hou

Department of Biostatistics, Johns Hopkins University
chris2018hou@gmail.com

Jacqui Thompson

Department of Biostatistics, Johns Hopkins University
jthom338@jh.edu

Department of Biostatistics, Johns Hopkins University
shicks19@jhu.edu
Source: vignettes/BiasDetec_vignettes.Rmd
BiasDetec_vignettes.Rmd

Installation

BiasDetect is a R package. Install development version from GitHub:

remotes::install("christinehou11/BiasDetect")

Basic User Guide

Load Necessary Packages

Install additional required packages before running package codes.

pkgs <- c("dplyr", "tidyr", "scran", "scry")
required_pkgs <- pkgs[!pkgs %in% rownames(installed.packages())]
BiocManager::install(required_pkgs)

Load additional packages. dplyr package is widely used in this vignettes to conduct data wrangling and specific information extraction.

# library(BiasDetect)

R session information 

#> R version 4.4.1 (2024-06-14)
#> Platform: x86_64-pc-linux-gnu
#> Running under: Ubuntu 22.04.4 LTS
#> 
#> Matrix products: default
